overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player walking through a foggy, neon-lit suburban street at night. The scene transitions from a traditional Japanese residential area with passing traffic to a dirt lot approaching a commercial building, ending with entry into an indoor storage space.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential street with traditional housing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the roadside observing traditional architecture and distant city towers through the fog

notable_agents.action: sedan with headlights on driving away from the player down the road

entered.detail: low-rise wooden buildings with tiled roofs and lit windows lining the right side of the street
metal security fence running parallel to the road on the left side
wooden electrical pole with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
wet two-lane road with yellow dividing lines reflecting streetlights
tall modern towers with illuminated windows visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy suburban street lined with traditional Japanese houses on the right and a chain-link fence on the left. The wet asphalt reflects the glow of streetlights as sparse traffic passes by, with distant cyberpunk towers barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside with construction barriers and advertising

events.description: NCPD dispatcher notification appears on HUD indicating a reported crime in the area
player character moves toward the left edge of the road approaching concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road while passing construction barriers and large neon billboards on the left

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past the player and continuing down the road

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics on the left side of the road
red and white striped construction barriers lining the right edge of the roadway

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the road past construction barriers and large neon advertising billboards. An NCPD crime report notification appears on the HUD as the player approaches the left roadside, with vehicles continuing to pass by on the right while the traditional housing recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt lot approaching a neon-lit commercial building

events.description: steps off the asphalt road onto dirt and sparse grass terrain
approaches the entrance of the building with prominent purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: crossing the dirt lot toward a commercial building with vibrant purple neon trim

entered.detail: unpaved terrain with patches of grass and scattered debris
low-rise rectangular building outlined with bright purple neon strip lighting
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky near the building
large elevated advertising structure with illuminated panels

segments.scene_description: Leaving the paved road to cross a dirt lot scattered with sparse vegetation and abandoned vehicles. The player approaches a low-rise commercial building outlined in vibrant purple neon lighting, with palm trees and large billboards visible against the foggy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: back storage room of a commercial establishment

events.description: opens door and enters the building into a dimly lit back storage area

agents.ego_description: opening the metal door and walking into a narrow back room with shelves and equipment

entered.detail: metal storage racks holding various boxes and supplies
piles of white electronic equipment or appliances stacked against the wall
dark doorway leading deeper into the building with green light visible beyond
promotional posters taped to the orange wall advertising drink specials

segments.scene_description: Entering the building through a back door into a narrow storage room lined with metal shelving and stacked equipment. The interior features warm artificial lighting and promotional posters on orange walls, creating a stark contrast with the cool neon glow of the exterior environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy, neon-lit suburban street into the warm interior of a commercial storage space. It begins by moving along wet asphalt lined with traditional Japanese houses and a chain-link fence, where streetlights reflect off the road and distant towers loom through the haze. As the camera passes construction barriers and glowing advertising billboards, the residential housing recedes and the view shifts toward the roadside. The scene then opens up as the camera leaves the pavement to cross a dirt lot scattered with abandoned vehicles, approaching a low-rise building outlined in vibrant purple neon and framed by palm trees. Finally, the camera moves through a back door, transitioning from the cool exterior glow into a narrow storage room with orange walls, metal shelving, and warm artificial lighting.
